title: Song-Sermon.
content:
Lord, what is man
    That thou art mindful of him!
    Though in creation's van,
    Lord, what is man!
    He wills less than he can,
    Lets his ideal scoff him!
    Lord, what is man
    That thou art mindful of him!
meaning:
"Song-Sermon." is a quintessential example of George MacDonald's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
